meta.title: About
meta.description: Share these ideas and help build better civic habits and responsible communities everywhere.

cards.title: Civic Sense = Respect
cards.text: Civic sense isn't about rules — it's about respecting others and keeping shared spaces clean, safe, and peaceful.

cards.title: Small Actions Matter
cards.text: Plant a tree, reduce waste, keep your surroundings clean. Small everyday actions can create a big positive impact over time.

cards.title: Awareness Creates Change
cards.text: Understanding everyday civic habits helps build stronger, healthier, and more responsible communities.

cards.title: Every Habit Counts
cards.text: Cleaner streets, less pollution, and safer environments start with simple choices we make every day.
